speaker: Marta
text: I can’t believe it, Gianni still hasn’t finished his part of the project!

speaker: Gianni
text: Hey, calm down! I’m working on it, I had some issues.

speaker: Luca
text: Always last-minute problems though. And us? We’re the ones facing the presentation tomorrow.

speaker: Marta
text: It’s not fair! Sara and I pulled all-nighters to finish our parts.

speaker: Sara
text: Guys, stop fighting... we all know we’re stressed.

speaker: Gianni
text: Okay, fine! Tonight I’ll stay up until I finish everything. I don’t want to ruin the group project.

speaker: Luca
text: Fine, but tomorrow it has to be ready. No excuses.

speaker: Marta
text: I really hope so, because I can’t handle this tension anymore.

speaker: Sara
text: Come on, tomorrow will be fine. We built this together and I don’t want it to end with resentment.

speaker: Marta
text: I hope so... I don’t want to fight with anyone.

speaker: Luca
text: Come on guys, let’s stay positive at least for tonight.

speaker: Gianni
text: Okay, I’m going back to work. I’ll update you in a few hours.
